channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: NordPass Reveals Shocking Password Habits: "123456" Tops the List (Again)
item.description: The NordPass report shows that people are still using weak passwords, with '123456' being the most common password for the sixth consecutive year. This lack of digital security is alarming and leaves users vulnerable to cyber threats.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
